subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-04-07
subcodes.first_line: My God ever assist and confirm you. Whenever you go to visit the Holy Tomb you must implore and supplicate that God may surround you with His invisible confirmations.
subcodes.subjects: @need for an educator, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @spiritual transformation
